topics.title: Summer House Season 10 Reunion: West Wilson Called Out for Lying, Amanda & Kyle Aftermath
topics.hook: The Summer House reunion drops May 26 and West Wilson is already being skewered for claiming there was 'no overlap' between his entanglements. Kyle Cooke is auditing his Instagram follows. Ciara Miller showed up in a revenge dress. The whole thing is a masterclass in what happens when people build relationships without honest agreements.
topics.angle: The 'no overlap' lie is the enemy of intentional partnership. When you skip the honest conversation up front, you always end up having it at a Bravo reunion instead.

topics.title: Gen Z Lavender Marriage Trend: 200%+ Interest Surge, Dating App Fatigue Hits Critical Mass
topics.hook: Lavender marriages are up 200% since 2020. A February 2026 study found Gen Z spends 156 hours a year on dating apps and gets just 6 meaningful connections. People are done optimizing for romance and starting to optimize for actual life.
topics.angle: The pivot from 'finding the one' to 'building with someone intentional' is the realest relationship shift of this generation.

topics.title: Influencer Divorce Wave: TikTok Couple Kristy & Desmond Scott Split After Infidelity Allegations
topics.hook: Another 'relationship goals' couple bites the dust publicly. The pattern is exhaustingly familiar: curated content, #CoupleGoals, followed by the split announcement TikTok with sad indie music.
topics.angle: Stop taking relationship advice from people whose relationship is their content. Performance and partnership are different products.
